signals.headline: Institutional Flow Shift** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
signals.raw:
Institutional Flow Shift** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
XRP recorded $119.6 million in inflows—its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025—unseating Bitcoin and Solana, reflecting post-regulatory clarity reshaping institutional behavior[2].

signals.headline: XRP Regulatory Clarity** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
XRP Regulatory Clarity** | YES | HIGH confidence
The CLARITY Act markup in late April carries 72% odds on Polymarket of formally classifying XRP as a digital commodity, potentially unlocking $4-8 billion in dedicated ETF capital[4]. This represents a key catalyst that could move prediction markets.
